title: How github pages is suitable for static websites
summary: GitHub Pages GitHub Pages is perfect for static websites (HTML, CSS, JS), documentation sites, and simple frontend apps — but not for backend servers like Java, Spring Boot APIs, etc. Code print("Hello, world!") markup: highlight: guessSyntax: true public class HelloWorld { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello, Hugo + PaperMod!"); } } <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title>PaperMod Site</title> </head> <body> <h1>Hello World!</h1> </body> </html> body { background-color: #f0f0f0; color: #333; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; } git init git add . git commit -m "Initial commit" git push origin main FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim COPY ./target/app.jar app.jar ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app.jar"] function greet(name) { console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`); } greet('PaperMod User'); SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC; def sayHello(name) { println "Hello, $name!" } sayHello('Groovy User') # Welcome to My Blog - Java - Spring Boot - Hugo
content: GitHub Pages GitHub Pages is perfect for static websites (HTML, CSS, JS), documentation sites, and simple frontend apps — but not for backend servers like Java, Spring Boot APIs, etc. Code print("Hello, world!") markup: highlight: guessSyntax: true public class HelloWorld { public static void main(String[] args) { System.out.println("Hello, Hugo + PaperMod!"); } } <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title>PaperMod Site</title> </head> <body> <h1>Hello World!</h1> </body> </html> body { background-color: #f0f0f0; color: #333; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; } git init git add . git commit -m "Initial commit" git push origin main FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim COPY ./target/app.jar app.jar ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app.jar"] function greet(name) { console.log(`Hello, ${name}!`); } greet('PaperMod User'); SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = true ORDER BY created_at DESC; def sayHello(name) { println "Hello, $name!" } sayHello('Groovy User') # Welcome to My Blog - Java - Spring Boot - Hugo

title: SpringBoot
summary:
Welcome to My Custom Page! This is a custom page created with the Hugo PaperMod theme.
Spring Boot Tutorials Here are some useful Spring Boot tutorials:
Spring Boot Official Documentation Baeldung - Spring Boot Tutorials Spring Boot Guide by JavaTpoint Spring Boot Tutorials by GeeksforGeeks Spring Boot Quick Start by YouTube - Amigoscode Spring Boot in Action (Book) Feel free to explore these resources to deepen your understanding of Spring Boot!
content:
Welcome to My Custom Page! This is a custom page created with the Hugo PaperMod theme.
Spring Boot Tutorials Here are some useful Spring Boot tutorials:
Spring Boot Official Documentation Baeldung - Spring Boot Tutorials Spring Boot Guide by JavaTpoint Spring Boot Tutorials by GeeksforGeeks Spring Boot Quick Start by YouTube - Amigoscode Spring Boot in Action (Book) Feel free to explore these resources to deepen your understanding of Spring Boot!
